title: Cat and Mouse in a Haunted House
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo gets lost in the foggy Dark Forest and spends a spooky Halloween night in a creepy castle full of cats and 'ghosts'! 👻

options.en: A doctor who treats scared mice
A newspaper mouse who runs The Rodent's Gazette
options.zh: 一只经营《啮齿动物公报》的老鼠记者

options.en: A chef at the French restaurant Le Squeakery
options.zh: 在吱吱法餐厅当厨师的鼠

options.en: A cat who haunts Cannycat Castle
options.zh: 一只出没于卡尼猫城堡的猫

explain.en: Geronimo says he lives in New Mouse City and runs The Rodent's Gazette, the most popular paper on Mouse Island.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩说自己住在老鼠岛首府新鼠城，经营着岛上最受欢迎的报纸《啮齿动物公报》。

q.en: Why was Geronimo driving through the Dark Forest?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩为什么会开车穿过幽暗森林？

options.en: To deliver cheese to Cannycat Castle
options.zh: 要给卡尼猫城堡送奶酪

options.en: To visit his aunt Sweetfur in the Pleasant Paw Hills
options.zh: 要去欢乐爪丘陵探望他的甜毛姑妈

options.en: To escape from a scary cat
options.zh: 为了躲避一只可怕的猫

options.en: To go bowling at Lucky Paw Lanes
options.zh: 去幸运爪球馆打保龄球

explain.en: He left New Mouse City to visit his aunt Sweetfur, who was on vacation in the Pleasant Paw Hills, and had to drive through the Dark Forest.
explain.zh: 他离开新鼠城，是去探望在欢乐爪丘陵度假的甜毛姑妈，途中必须开车穿过幽暗森林。

q.en: On what special night does the story begin?
q.zh: 这个故事开始于哪一个特别的夜晚？

options.zh: 十月三十一日的万圣节前夜

explain.en: Geronimo realizes it is a foggy October night and then remembers 'Today is October thirty-first. It's Halloween!'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩发现那是个雾蒙蒙的十月夜晚，随后想起『今天是十月三十一日，万圣节前夜！』

q.en: What is the name of the castle Geronimo finds?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩发现的城堡叫什么名字？

explain.en: A sign in the fog reads 'To Cannycat Castle,' and a wall hanging says the castle belongs to Duke Bigpaw Cannycat.
explain.zh: 雾中出现一块路牌写着『通往卡尼猫城堡』，墙上的挂毯也说明城堡属于大爪卡尼猫公爵。

q.en: What sound does the castle doorbell make?
q.zh: 城堡的门铃发出的是什么声音？

options.zh: 一段录音里可怕的猫叫声

explain.en: When Geronimo presses the blood-red doorbell, a horrifying 'MEEEEOOOOWWW!!!' plays — he later learns it was a taped meow.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩按下血红的门铃后，响起一声可怕的『喵呜——！』，后来他发现那是录音里的猫叫。

q.en: In what year was the battle of Raterloo, and who won?
q.zh: 拉特卢战役发生在哪一年，又是谁获胜了？

options.zh: 一七五四年，啮齿动物获胜
一八一五年，啮齿动物获胜

explain.en: Geronimo recalls from his Encyclopaedia Ratannica that the battle of Raterloo took place in 1754 and the rodents won.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩从《鼠类百科全书》中记起，拉特卢战役发生在1754年，最终是啮齿动物取得了胜利。

q.en: What does Geronimo find in the kitchen cellar?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在厨房的地窖里发现了什么？

options.en: A mouse bone and a big block of Swiss cheese
options.zh: 一根老鼠骨头和一大块瑞士奶酪

explain.en: In the cellar he spots cans of tuna, dried meat, and a big block of Swiss cheese, and finds a mouse bone inside the copper pot.
explain.zh: 在地窖里，他看到金枪鱼罐头、肉干和一大块瑞士奶酪，还在铜锅里发现了一根老鼠骨头。

q.en: Which family members come to the castle to help Geronimo?
q.zh: 哪些家人赶来城堡帮忙杰罗尼摩？

options.en: His aunt Sweetfur and uncle Flickrat
options.zh: 他的甜毛姑妈和弗利克拉特叔叔

options.en: His boss and the newspaper editor
His sister Thea, cousin Trap, and nephew Benjamin
options.zh: 他的妹妹蒂奥、表哥特拉普和侄子本杰明

options.en: Two friendly cats from the castle

explain.en: After Geronimo calls her, his sister Thea arrives with cousin Trap and nephew Benjamin to see the 'ghost.'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩打电话后，妹妹蒂奥带着表哥特拉普和侄子本杰明赶来，想亲眼看看那只『幽灵』。

q.en: Who believes Geronimo and solves the mystery like a detective?
q.zh: 谁相信杰罗尼摩，并像小侦探一样解开了谜团？

explain.en: Benjamin always believes his uncle, finds clues like a gray painted feather and an extension cord, and helps him solve the trick.
explain.zh: 本杰明始终相信叔叔，还像侦探一样找到涂成灰色的鸡毛、电线等线索，帮他识破了恶作剧。

q.en: What was the real cause of all the spooky ghosts and monsters?
q.zh: 所有可怕的幽灵和怪物其实是怎么回事？

options.en: A box of Halloween magic tricks and practical jokes called Pranky Paws
options.zh: 一盒名叫『捣蛋爪』的万圣节魔术道具和恶作剧玩具
一只名叫斯莱德波的真正幽灵

options.en: Geronimo's bad dream after eating cheese
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩吃奶酪后做的噩梦

options.en: A curse on the Cannycat family
options.zh: 卡尼猫家族受到的诅咒

explain.en: On the stairs they find a tag for 'Pranky Paws: Super Scary Halloween Magic Tricks and Practical Jokes,' proving someone was playing tricks.
explain.zh: 他们在楼梯上发现一张写着『捣蛋爪：超可怕万圣节魔术与恶作剧』的标签，证明一切都是有人在搞恶作剧。
